seoTitle: Goodwood Island vs Googong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goodwood Island and Googong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Goodwood Island vs Googong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goodwood Island and Googong.
heading: Goodwood Island vs Googong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goodwood Island, New South Wales and Googong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Googong has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Goodwood Island (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goodwood Island or Googong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goodwood Island has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Googong scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goodwood Island scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Googong scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goodwood Island or Googong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Googong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
